title: Cassettes Over Discs
description: Replaces Discs with Cassettes Tapes, and the Jukebox with a Cassette Player.
body:
![Two Cassette Tapes sit by the Tape Player.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2077467e210752f92ad391616007e86f63a6dc97.png)
## For The Analog Audiophile.

Replaces all music discs with 3D cassette tapes, and replaces the jukebox with a Cassette Player that looks the same on all sides. Disc 5 Fragment is also replaced by a Tape Fragment. Item names are also changed.
